fieldPurpose.sourceMarkdownPath: Intended notebook path where the agent would write the source note.
fieldPurpose.targetWikiPath: Intended wiki path where the promoted article should live.
fieldPurpose.sourcePath: Local fixture file path for the source notebook note.
fieldPurpose.wikiPath: Local fixture file path for the promoted wiki markdown.
fieldPurpose.htmlPath: Local fixture file path for the HTML artifact.
fieldPurpose.chatPath: Local fixture file path for the chat handoff message.
